subject: biology
title: 19N.1.SL.TZ0.22
question_html:
An organism has the following characteristics:

  • single opening for ingestion and egestion
  • radial symmetry
  • tentacles with stinging cells.

In what phylum would it most likely be classified?

A. Annelida

B. Cnidaria

C. Platyhelminthes

D. Porifera
